description_long: This object is a large, rectangular cardboard box filled to the brim with fresh cucumbers. The box has a ribbed, corrugated texture on its vertical sides, giving it a sturdy and utilitarian appearance. The top surface is open, revealing a densely packed layer of green cucumbers with bumpy, textured skins. The cucumbers are arranged in a way that maximizes the use of space, with their characteristic elongated shapes and dark green color visible. One side of the box features a diagonal darkened panel, possibly indicating a shadow or a different material. The overall impression is of a produce container commonly found in urban markets or grocery stores, designed for bulk storage and easy access to the vegetables inside.
description: A large, ribbed cardboard box filled with fresh green cucumbers, open at the top and densely packed. The box is sturdy and utilitarian, typical for produce storage or display.
description_view_0: The box is seen from the front, showing its ribbed cardboard texture and the open top filled with green cucumbers.
description_view_1: This view is similar to the front, with the ribbed cardboard sides and the cucumbers visible at the top.
description_view_2: The box is shown with a prominent diagonal dark panel on one side, contrasting with the ribbed cardboard and the cucumbers on top.
description_view_3: Another ribbed cardboard side is visible, with the open top displaying the cucumbers inside.
attribute_location: isolated in space with an undefined background
attribute_visible_markings: ribbed texture on cardboard, bumpy texture on cucumbers, one side with a diagonal dark panel
